metadata.title: Johann Sebastian Bach - Complete BWV Catalog
metadata.description: Comprehensive catalog of all known works by Johann Sebastian Bach, organized by BWV (Bach-Werke-Verzeichnis) number
sources: IMSLP - List of works by Johann Sebastian Bach
Wikipedia - List of compositions by Johann Sebastian Bach

fields.title: Title of the work
fields.date_composed: Year or approximate date of composition
fields.city_composed: City where the work was composed or first performed
fields.duration_seconds: Approximate duration in seconds (based on typical performances)
fields.instruments: List of instruments or voices used
fields.preceding_bwv: BWV number of the preceding work in catalog
fields.preceding_title: Title of the preceding work in catalog
fields.following_bwv: BWV number of the following work in catalog
fields.following_title: Title of the following work in catalog
fields.notes: Additional notes about the work (authenticity, arrangements, etc.)

metadata.duration_note: Durations are approximate typical performance times based on genre and work type. Individual performances may vary significantly.
metadata.location_note: Cities are based on Bach's known biographical periods: Arnstadt (1703-1707), Mühlhausen (1707-1708), Weimar (1708-1717), Köthen (1717-1723), Leipzig (1723-1750)
